web_results.title: Unlocking exponential value with AI agent orchestration
web_results.description: Research suggests that today’s emerging multiagent systems can perform better with humans in the loop, as they benefit from human experience and remain aligned with the nuanced organizational expectations.10 We predict that, in the next 12 to 18 months, more businesses will accelerate experimenting and scaling of complex agent orchestrations, keeping humans in the loop. They will likely adopt frameworks and solutions to integrate human judgment into agentic workflows for higher confidence, quality, and accountability.11 · Additionally, a progressive “autonomy spectrum”—humans in the loop, on the loop, and out of the loop—will emerge based on task complexity, business domain, workflow design, and outcome criticality (figure 3).
